text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I didn't mean to worry you... It's just that my
head has been throbbing all morning...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe... heh. I guess that makes me sound like a
grown-up, in a way.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Argh... But it's certainly not a pleasant feeling...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower's headache persists for quite some
time after that...
